name: BowNow
description: Japanese B2B marketing automation by Cloud Circus with lead scoring, email and CRM-sync APIs.

seo.title: BowNow — CRM / Lifecycle Automation
seo.meta_description: BowNow: Japanese B2B marketing automation by Cloud Circus with lead scoring, email and CRM-sync APIs.

when_to_use: Lead scoring for B2B Japanese marketing automation
Email nurture sequences synced with kintone CRM
Website visitor tracking for sales team prioritization
Automated LINE message follow-ups for Japanese SMBs
Measuring campaign ROI with integrated analytics dashboard

pros: Free tier lowers barrier for Japanese SMBs
Strong fit with JP business culture and language
Lead scoring works out of the box
CRM-sync API connects to Salesforce and kintone
cons: Interface and docs primarily in Japanese
Fewer integrations vs HubSpot or Marketo
Reporting is basic compared to global MA tools
review.verdict: Solid entry-level MA for Japanese market; free tier makes it the default SMB choice in JP.
review.best_for: Japanese B2B SMBs starting with marketing automation
review.not_for: Global teams or enterprises needing multilingual support
